title: Fix multi-arch build version check
body:
This was copy-pasted from buildah and podman, unfortunately the
Dockerfile entrypoint is different for skopeo. Fix it.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/runs/2771691404?check_suite_focus=true

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat another option here (possibly more desirable), is to remove the `ENTRYPOINT` here (so it matches `buildah` and `podman`).

Don't remove the entrypoint, at this point users are probably relying on it.

We went back and forth on this when we were first creating these images.
This is ready to go then (all builds are currently failing).
Pressed re-run on failed tests (they looked like networking flakes)

LGTM
and happy green test buttons.
[Noted automatic run failed](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/runs/2837054486) due to a permissions problem on quay.io.  I fixed that and re-ran the job.
